name: ExtensionTransport_Status
title: R5: in-progress | completed | abandoned | cancelled | planned | entered-in-error (new)
purpose: This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the¥r¥nelement `Transport.status` as defined in FHIR R5¥r¥nin FHIR R4.¥r¥n¥r¥nThe source element is defined as:¥r¥n`Transport.status` 0..1 `code`¥r¥n¥r¥nAcross FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:¥r¥n* R5 `Transport.status` 0..1 `code`¥r¥n¥r¥nFollowing are the generation technical comments:¥r¥nElement `Transport.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.¥nElement `Transport.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: in-progress | completed | abandoned | cancelled | planned | entered-in-error (new)
element.comment: Element `Transport.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.¥nElement `Transport.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
element.isModifierReason: This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that contains status entered-in-error which means that the resource should not be treated as valid
